name: Tax Around the World
description: Interactive world map and rankings of every country's tax system — corporate, personal income (with brackets), VAT, capital gains, dividends and social security — with sourced figures for 227 countries.

name: Language Cheat Sheets
description: Survival-level hover dictionaries for French and Polish — hover any phrase for a word-by-word breakdown, pronunciation, and why it's built that way.

name: Culture Quizzer
description: Broad cultural knowledge practice with map, art, politics, history, music, philosophy, and solar-system quiz modes.

name: Ray Peat archive
description: Full-text search across every article on raypeat.com with fuzzy matching and quoted snippets.

name: Biohacking Compendium
description: Bottom-up education in human physiology — foundations, deep dives, and a 250+ compound database, with honest calibration on the evidence.

name: Three-Way Forecasting — Mathematics
description: Readable introduction to the maths behind three-way (P&L, balance sheet, cashflow) business forecasting.

name: CPGE Mathematics
description: Hybrid maths curriculum for French CPGE students — Bourbaki rigour, historical progression.

name: Jonny Diggens — jonnydiggens.com
description: Landing page for Jonny Diggens, Edinburgh-based saxophonist for hire (weddings, corporate, private events).

name: So Soul Records
description: UK urban-jazz & R&B label site featuring Edy Forey and emerging artists.

name: Ever
description: Voice-first gym tracking — log your sets by speaking, data lands straight in a Google Sheet.

name: Jonny Diggens — Vercel preview
description: Vercel-hosted version of the Jonny Diggens saxophonist landing page (mirrors jonnydiggens.com).

name: TAISK
description: FCA-compliant cashflow forecasting tool for early-stage founders seeking funding.

name: MIDI Keyboard & Metronome
description: Clickable piano keyboard and metronome — play with mouse or computer keyboard, Web Audio API.

name: Scotland Top Schools Map
description: Interactive map of Scotland's top-quartile state secondary schools (top 86 of 342) ranked by 5+ Highers, 2023–24, with per-school markers and a filterable list.

name: Protection Guide (private)
description: Password-protected, client-side-encrypted walkthrough for arranging family protection insurance. Household use only.
